caption: A person's hands are shown opening a cardboard box containing sports card products on a table. In the initial scene, the hands hold a white box with a blue label, surrounded by other similar boxes and a small red container. The person uses a small utility knife to slice through the packing tape on the top of the box. As the sequence progresses, the person reaches inside and pulls out a dark blue box featuring the text "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC". A small inset video in the corner shows a man wearing a white baseball cap and a black t-shirt. Prominent orange and white logos for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible as overlays on the screen. The background includes a white surface and a green mat with the words "Sports Cards & Collectibles" partially visible.
